titleStmt.title: SII 38.384: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 384. (A.R. No. 384 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the north wall, second prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Achuyutayyadeva-Mahārāya Year: Śaka 1456 Jaya, Kaṉṉi, śu. di. 10 Monday = Sept 17, 1534 A.D. but the Week day was Thursday.

summary.p: Records that the taxes collected from the residents of Sembiyamaṅgalam and Kuṟumbattuṟai, Viraṇa Kavundaṉ, Timmaṇa Kavundaṉ, Puchchiṟ Vīrappaṉ, Śekkumattāli Pugaikuriya . . ., Periyanāthaṉ, Periyavīrappaṉ, Paṭṭappaṉ and Mallappaṉ who paid taxes such as vaḍugaṟai, mugampārvai and other taxes amounting to 71(1/2) paṇam were to be remitted to the temple treasury by Tirumalaināthar Piḷḷai, the younger brother of Piḻaipōṟuttar Piḷḷai in order to conduct a festival on the occasion of Pavitturai-tirumāḷ in the month of Āḍi (in the above temple) to the god Tirumalaruḍaiya Tambirāṉār of Dēvakkāpuram for the merit of Achuyutayyadēva-Mahārāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śusvraśrīRead svastiśrī maṉ makāmaṇṭalecura metiṉi micura kaṇṭa kaṭṭāri cāḷuva śrī viṟapiṟatāyaśrīvīrapiṟatāpaAccutaiyateva makāirāyar
piṟutiviirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa cakāṟtam 1000 4 100 5 10 6 melcellā niṉṟa ceyavaruṣattu pūṟuva paṣaṣaRead pūṟuvapakṣattuttu kaṉ
ṉināyaṟṟu tecamiyum peṟṟa comavārattu nāḷ tevakkāpuram tirumalaruṭaiya tampirāṉāṟku Āṭi mātam pavatturaiRead pavittira
tirunāḷ Accutaiyatevamakāirāyaṟku taṉmam Āka piḻai poruttarpiḷḷai tampiyār tirumalainātar piḷḷai
viṭuvitta cempiyamaṅkalam kuṟumpattuṟai viraṇakavuṇṭaṉ mā10 2 timmaṇakavuṇṭaṉ pucciṟ virappaṉ cekkumattāḷi pu�
kuriya ø8 periyanātaṉ ø7 periya virappaṉ ø3 paṭṭappaṉ ø8 mallappaṉ ø8 Āka ø6 10 1 vaṭukaṟai mukampārvai m Āka ø7 10 1kku
yintappaṇam Eḻupattoṉṟaraiyum pervaḻiyile mukkantāyam Āka kantāyappiṟāttiyile tirukkoyilpaṇṭārattile
celutti cukattileirukka kaṭaivar Ākavum Intataṉmattukku Iyātoruvar Akutam paṇṇiṉavar kaṅkai
karaiyile kārāmpacuvai koṉṟa pāvattile pokakkaṭaivarkaḷ Ākavum §
Digital edition of SII 38.384 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
